name: Caesar Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Loaf soft, thick sliced Italian bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter with Caesar salad dressing, garlic, mustard, parsley, and Worcestershire sauce until light and fluffy.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on each slice of bread.
3. Place the buttered sides together to form sandwiches.
4. Stack the sandwiches and wrap in foil.
5. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
6. Remove foil and bake an additional 10 minutes, or until edges are crispy.
7. Serves 6-8 people
